display.label: Name of the record field from which embeddings should be created.
display.description: Name of the field of the record which content will be used as an input for embeddings. Supports also nested fields.

display.label: Name of the field which would contain the embeddings of the input field.
display.description: Name of the field which which will be appended to the record and which would contain the embeddings of the content `filed.source` field. Supports also nested fields.

display.label: Voyage AI base URL.
display.description: Base URL for Voyage AI client. If not provided, default Voyage AI client URL will be used.

display.label: Voyage AI API access token.
display.description: Access token for Voyage AI API.

display.label: Model name.
display.description: Name of the Voyage AI model which should be used.

display.label: Operation timeout.
display.description: Milliseconds to wait for Voyage AI calculations to finish (defaults to 15000). Default: 15000
